text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Persistent right hemithorax pain extending to K8-K10, corresponding to the mid and anterior axillary regions, following trauma 7 days ago.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "No additional sounds on pulmonary examination Pulmonary examination: eupnoeic, no peripheral cyanosis, reports no cough, vesicular murmur +/+ with no additional sounds.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Cardiovascular examination: reports no angina, rhythmic tones, free pauses, no signs of right or left heart failure, no signs of DVT or SVT, peripheral pulses perceptable and symmetrical.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Abdominal examination: abdomen flat, palpable, not tender upon superficial and deep palpation.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "No palpable masses, free hernial gates.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Diffuse tympanism and borborygmi.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "PERSONS_NAME neg, Mc Burney neg, PERSONS_NAME neg, PERSONS_NAME neg, reports no bowel/diuresis disorders.", 0.0, 0.5)
